quote.issuer_name: Shenzhen Senior Technology Material Co., Ltd. - H Shares
quote.nm: Shenzhen Senior Technology Material Co., Ltd. - H Shares
quote.summary: Shenzhen Senior Technology Material Co Ltd is a China-based company primarily engaged in the research and development, production and sales of lithium-ion battery separators. The Company’s product portfolio mainly includes dry process separators, wet process separators and coated separators. The products are primarily used in lithium-ion batteries for various transportation vehicles, electrical energy storage facilities, consumer electronics such as smartphones, cameras and power tools, and industrial machinery such as cranes and forklifts. The products are distributed under the SENIOR brand. The Company distributes its products within the domestic market, and to overseas markets including South Korea, Japan, Southeast Asia, and Europe.
